lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Heya! What can I get you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What ales are you serving?

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Well, we've got Asgarnian Ale, Wizard's Mind Bomb and Dwarven Stout, all for only 3 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: One Asgarnian Ale, please.

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: I said 3 coins! You haven't got 3 coins!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'll come back another day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Kaylee.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll try the Mind Bomb.

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: I said 3 coins! You haven't got 3 coins!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'll come back another day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Kaylee.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have a Dwarven Stout?

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: I said 3 coins! You haven't got 3 coins!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'll come back another day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Kaylee.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't feel like any of those.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got this beer glass...

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: We'll buy it for a couple of coins if you're interested.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, sure.

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: There you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I like empty beer glasses.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got these beer glasses...

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Ooh, we'll buy those off you if you're interested. 2 coins per glass.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, sure.

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: There you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I like empty beer glasses.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's this about the party room?

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Have you heard? Someone's planning a big party!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Someone's put something very valuable into the party room drop chest! If you go to the party room and pull the lever you might have a chance to get it!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: It could be your lucky day!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: No thanks, I don't need that.

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: No, try again.

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Correct!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: I have a question for you.

sections.title: When the Party Room chest contains more than 50,000 or 76,000 coins in Grand Exchange value (on a F2P or members' world respectively)

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Party! Party!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Something's happening in the party room!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Everyone get to the party room!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: What's happening in the party room?

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Someone's having a big party!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Get to the party room NOW!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Get to the party room!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Get to the party room quick!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Big value items in the party room now!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Quick! Get to the party room!
